tasks.description: Manual bypass for CTO-20260307-001 cascade recovery
tasks.context: Implement emergency manual trigger in orchestrator to execute CTO-20260307-001 (cascade failure recovery fix) bypassing deadlock. Add direct execution path that skips task queue and runs immediately with logging.

tasks.description: Manual bypass for CTO-20260307-002 execution watchdog
tasks.context: Extend manual bypass system to execute CTO-20260307-002 (execution watchdog). Must implement timeout detection and force-restart capability for stuck tasks. Log all forced completions.

tasks.description: Fix task status persistence preventing completion
tasks.context: Repair status update mechanism that prevents tasks from transitioning to 'completed'. Ensure database writes succeed and state mutations propagate. Add retry logic for failed updates.

tasks.description: Validate 80%+ execution rate with synthetic tasks
tasks.context: Create test harness that submits 10 synthetic tasks to orchestrator and verifies 8+ complete successfully within 10min. Measure actual completion rate and log failures. Must prove system recovered.
Build system to safely replay 18 approved fixes from backlog after execution validation passes. Add rate limiting (1 task/5min) and automatic rollback if failure rate exceeds 20%.
Expose real-time metrics endpoint showing task completion rate, queue depth, stuck task count, and last successful execution timestamp. Required for monitoring system health post-recovery.

Adjust deadlock detection thresholds to prevent false positives that freeze orchestrator unnecessarily. Increase timeout from 5min to 15min for complex tasks and add exemption list for known slow operations.
